# Birken Lofts — Complete Property Information

> 57 residences within the historic 1905 S. Birkenstein & Sons Building in River North, Chicago.

## About the Building

Built in 1905 as the headquarters for the S. Birkenstein & Sons Company, this heavy timber loft building has stood as a testament to Chicago's industrial heritage for over a century. Located in the heart of River North, its red brick facade and arched windows have witnessed the neighborhood's transformation from manufacturing hub to one of the city's most vibrant districts.

Birken Lofts honors this legacy through a thoughtful adaptive reuse — preserving the building's defining character elements including exposed heavy timber beams, original masonry walls, and distinctive arched window openings — while introducing 57 modern residences designed for contemporary living.

Detailed building history (Smokey Hollow, the Birkenstein family firm, the 1905 construction and 1912 fourth-story addition, the WWI scrap boom, and the building's later uses) is published at https://birkenlofts.com/history/

Construction updates and design notes are published on the Birken Lofts Journal at https://birkenlofts.com/blog/

## Developer

- Name: Monroe Residential Partners
- Website: https://monroeresidential.com

## Property Details

- Property name: Birken Lofts
- Website: https://birkenlofts.com
- Address: 401 W. Ontario Street, Chicago, IL 60654
- Neighborhood: River North, Chicago
- Coordinates: 41.8935°N, 87.6388°W
- Building type: Adaptive reuse / historic loft conversion
- Original construction: 1905
- Original use: S. Birkenstein & Sons Company headquarters
- Construction type: Heavy timber loft
- Historic status: Historically significant building

## Unit Mix

Total units: 57
Unit types: Studio, one-bedroom, and two-bedroom lofts
Size range: 550–1,400 square feet
Availability: Interest list open

### Floor Plans

#### Studio
- Size: 550–700 square feet
- Features: oversized windows, in-unit laundry

#### One bedroom
- Size: 750–1,000 square feet
- Features: exposed brick, walk-in closet

#### Two bedroom
- Size: 1,100–1,400 square feet
- Features: corner exposures, original timber posts

## Features & Amenities

### Heritage Features
- Exposed brick & heavy timber (original 1905)
- Oversized windows

### Modern Amenities
- In-unit laundry
- Fitness center
- Garage parking
- Pet friendly

### Restoration
- Historic restoration preserving Chicago's architectural legacy

### Finish Selections

Interior finish selections (June 2026 design direction, subject to change): kitchens with Daltile Artigiano (Venice Statue) backsplash, Silestone Charcoal Soapstone Eternal countertops (suede finish), Egger Pebble Grey flat-panel cabinetry, Amwell brushed satin nickel pulls, Evolux Sevilla Oak 9"×60" plank floors. Baths with MSI Carrara Trigato counters, Egger Cashmere Gray cabinets, Roca Limestone Blanco 12"×24" floors. CFG plumbing fixtures in polished chrome throughout. Corridor (woven wool runners, industrial pendants) and paint selections in progress. Full details: https://birkenlofts.com/finishes/

## Location & Proximity

Birken Lofts is located at the center of Chicago's River North neighborhood, surrounded by world-class galleries, restaurants, and nightlife, with easy access to the Loop, Magnificent Mile, and public transit.

### Walking Distances
- Chicago & Grand CTA station: 3 minute walk
- Magnificent Mile: 8 minute walk
- The Loop: 10 minute walk
- Chicago Riverwalk: 5 minute walk

## Development Timeline

| Phase | Date | Status | Description |
|-------|------|--------|-------------|
| Design & Planning | 2025 | Completed | Architectural plans developed honoring the 1905 heritage |
| Permits & Approvals | Early 2026 | Current | Historic preservation review and building permits secured |
| Construction Begins | October 2026 | Upcoming | Adaptive reuse construction commences on the historic building |
| First Deliveries | October 2027 | Upcoming | Residents move into their new loft homes in River North |

## Contact & Interest Registration

Prospective residents can register their interest to learn about availability, pricing, and exclusive preview opportunities.

- Web form: https://birkenlofts.com/#contact
- Address: 401 W. Ontario Street, Chicago, IL 60654

## Live Traffic Camera — Ohio Street Feeder Ramp

Birken Lofts hosts a free public webcam at https://birkenlofts.com/ohio-feeder-ramp-cam/ streaming live video of the Ohio Street feeder ramp in Chicago, 24 hours a day.

- What it shows: The Ohio Street feeder ramp, the elevated roadway that carries traffic between the Kennedy Expressway (I-90/94) and downtown Chicago through the River North neighborhood. Inbound drivers take the Ohio feeder off the Kennedy into River North and the Loop; outbound traffic reaches the expressway via the parallel Ontario Street feeder one block north.
- Camera location: Near 401 W. Ontario Street, River North, Chicago (the Birken Lofts site).
- Stream: YouTube Live, https://www.youtube.com/live/DdyWM2B-FYQ (embedded on the page). Runs continuously; may occasionally restart for maintenance.
- Useful for: checking real-time congestion on the Kennedy feeder ramps, weather and daylight conditions in River North, and timing trips into or out of downtown Chicago.
